body:
Audit source: 2026-06-11 axiomatic-shortcut pass.

The residual census reports the following FRI completeness residual `def : Prop` surfaces as open. These are not raw axioms, but they are explicit proof debt and should not become theorem-shaped or `True` placeholders.

Open residuals:

- `Fri.Spec.Completeness.queryRoundPerfectCompletenessResidual` — `ArkLib/ProofSystem/Fri/Spec/Completeness.lean:29`
- `Fri.Spec.Completeness.foldPhasePerfectCompletenessResidual` — `ArkLib/ProofSystem/Fri/Spec/Completeness.lean:52`
- `Fri.Spec.Completeness.reductionPerfectCompletenessResidual` — `ArkLib/ProofSystem/Fri/Spec/Completeness.lean:84`
- `Fri.Spec.Completeness.foldRoundPerfectCompletenessResidual` — `ArkLib/ToMathlib/FriComplete.lean:106`
- `Fri.Spec.Completeness.finalFoldRoundPerfectCompletenessResidual` — `ArkLib/ToMathlib/FriComplete.lean:131`

Acceptance criteria:

- Prove the per-round and final-round perfect-completeness obligations against the concrete FRI round definitions.
- Use those proofs to close `foldPhasePerfectCompletenessResidual` and then `reductionPerfectCompletenessResidual`.
- Remove or discharge the `ToMathlib/FriComplete.lean` residual surfaces once the in-tree proof-system file owns the theorem.
- Keep the residual census open count decreasing and avoid `: True`, raw `axiom`, or bodyless `opaque`/`constant` replacements.
- Add focused `#print axioms` checks for the final FRI completeness theorem.

comments.body: Closeout audit (2026-06-11): **3 of 5 already discharged** — `foldRoundPerfectCompletenessResidual_holds` (`FriCompletePerRound.lean:137`), `finalFoldRoundPerfectCompletenessResidual_holds` (`FriCompleteFinalRound.lean:125`), `foldPhasePerfectCompletenessResidual_holds` (`FriCompleteFoldPhase.lean:223`). **Genuinely open: `queryRoundPerfectCompletenessResidual` and `reductionPerfectCompletenessResidual`** (no discharge anywhere in-tree) — the query-round one is the real remaining work; the reduction-level one should follow from the fold-phase + query-round pair via the seam fold once the query round lands. Not ready to close yet.

title: FRI: discharge perfect-completeness residual Props
